description_long: This object consists of six red cylindrical sticks bundled together with two brown straps, resembling classic dynamite sticks. At the center of the bundle, a hexagonal device with a yellow-orange border is attached, likely serving as a detonator or timer. Several gray wires extend from the device, looping outward and connecting to the ends of the sticks, suggesting an electrical detonation mechanism. The red sticks have a glossy, smooth finish, and the overall construction appears compact and portable, with a small handle on top for carrying. The device is visually striking due to its bright red color and the prominent central component. No visible warning labels or text are present on the exterior.
description: A bundle of six red dynamite sticks strapped together with a central hexagonal detonator and visible wires.
description_view_0: Side view showing the six red sticks bundled together, brown straps, and a handle on top.
description_view_1: End view displaying the circular arrangement of the sticks and the protruding wires and detonator.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the hexagonal detonator device and the looping wires.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the wires extending from the detonator and the bundled sticks.
attribute_detonation_mechanism: The device features a central hexagonal detonator with several visible wires, suggesting an electrical or timed detonation mechanism, likely activated by the central component.
